summary.title: On-prem solution
summary.description: An on-premises hosted web application and MS SQL database, deployed in a resilient configuration. The web application provides the front-door web commerce platform for Widgets Inc.

data.name: External User
data.description: External user accessing the website via a modern web browser.

threats.title: Credential attack
threats.description: Using common authentication attacks (brute-force etc) to gain access to the system
threats.mitigation:
End-users have limited access to the service based on least-privilege access.
Admin interfaces are only accessible via internal interfaces.

threats.title: Vulnerability scanning
threats.description: Systematic enumeration and examination in order to find weaknesses and points where a security vulnerability might exist
threats.mitigation: SaaS vendor provides patching and maintains service.

threats.title: Footprinting
threats.description: Information gathering with the objective of learning as much as possible about the composition, configuration and security mechanisms of the application
threats.mitigation: Defences include shutting down unnecessary services/ports and excluding information that could identify and compromise security of the organisation

threats.title: Vulnerability scanning
threats.description: Systematic enumeration and examination in order to find weaknesses and points where a security vulnerability might exist
threats.mitigation: Vendor maintains system security, applies patches and manages security risks as part of the service.

threats.title: Vulnerability scanning
threats.description: Systematic enumeration and examination in order to find weaknesses and points where a security vulnerability might exist
threats.mitigation: Devices should be patched and monitored with standard endpoint management

threats.title: Denial of Service
threats.description: The system could be impacted by DDoS attacks
threats.mitigation: Front-end services provide protection from DDoS and related attacks. Internet provision is via JISC who provide upstream DDoS protection

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.description: Provide a description for this threat
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Inappropriate access to data
threats.description: Collecting accessible data and/or processed output from the application
threats.mitigation:
MS SQL provides granular access to users and administrators.
Access is provided based on least-privilege.
MFA is used to secure access to privileged accounts.

threats.title: Vulnerable transport protocol
threats.description: Older transport protocols are vulnerable and have known vulnerabilities
threats.mitigation: Use up to date cryptography and transport protocols

threats.title: User account impersonation
threats.description: Identity could be compromised, leading to unauthorised access to systems.
threats.mitigation: All accounts require MFA for authentication. Step-up access to privileged roles requires MFA and peer/manager approval.

threats.title: Inappropriate access to data
threats.description: Collecting accessible data and/or processed output from the application.
threats.mitigation:
MS SQL provides granular access to users and administrators.
Access is provided based on least-privilege.
MFA is used to secure access to privileged accounts.

threats.title: Vulnerable encryption algorithms
threats.description: Out of date encryption algorithms are vulnerable and have known vulnerabilities
threats.mitigation: SQL database encryption is in-use and utilises modern encryption algorithms provided by the vendor.
